reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability review run from cmd/sworn/maintainability_ledger_test.go:TestMaintainabilityLedgerBinaryReachability reaches C-05 reuse authority and then fails closed at the next unavailable gate

effort_complexity.rationale: Cryptographic committed-report identity and exact reuse authority.

release_benefit: Makes every compact maintainability ledger entry provably refer to one immutable full report and semantic input.

design_decisions.choice: Bind compact lifecycle authority to one committed full-report blob and expose validation/reuse through the serial maintainability command.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 Coach instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: use blob-pinned C-05 identity on the public command path.
design_decisions.rationale: Restart-safe reuse is safe only when report bytes, scope, lifecycle identity and committed object identity are inseparable.

positive_scenarios: An exact committed Baton report with valid structured dispositions and engine-owned overlay provenance is reused with zero dispatch after freshness-frontier revalidation.
negative_scenarios: Any missing, rewritten, duplicate, escaped, malformed disposition/provenance, stale frontier, or mismatched evidence is non-authoritative.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Blob-bound reports make restart-safe reuse possible without trusting mutable status summaries.
